Over a year later, air Magic has yet to resolve the inspection failure. I am now forced to seek legal assistance. I can’t not sell my place with an open inspection.  I am very disappointed. Now today 12/192023 days b a new unit no HEAT. 55 degrees.
reviews.owner_answer:
Good Morning Sylvester,

I know we just spoke on the phone but I wanted to follow up here as well. As for the initial inspection with the city, we advised at the time that we do not have a technician on site for the inspection due to the inspection process. As we have discussed numerous times since installation we have attempted to close out the permit. The problem is that there is not enough room for all air conditioning units on the stand that your unit is on so we had to do an extension. New units are larger so when people start to replace them it creates a space issue on the stand. We have no control over this issue as it involves other homeowners as well. I know your community is working on replacing the roof stands when they redo the roof. This will eliminate the space issue because the new stands will be able to accommodate the units on each stand. We have reached out to several engineers and were going to pay for additional engineered details to show a city approved detail so that we could close out the city permit before the roof since we understand that the roofing process can take awhile. We have been unable to find an engineer that would write any approved detail for your current stand. We have reached out to the mechanical inspector at the city and he advised that if we could not locate an engineer to provide an  approved detail, the only other option would be to wait for the roof to be completed. We understand your frustration and would like to get this resolved as quickly as possible. We have been in communication throughout the process, and will continue to do so. We apologize that the heat is not working and we will have a technician there today to evaluate and see what the issue is.

reviews.review_text: Got called for scheduled maintenance. i approved they showed up about a month later. Tech comes does his thing, all looked fine and left.  Not one hour later my unit starts leaking water like crazy.  i called they came back he tells me he cant do anything to use towels as a temporary solution until he can get reschedule a fix and get someone out there. Towels "seriously", another month passed by and no Tech.  i called the lady answered, i explained she said why did i wait so long i had explained since they took so long the first time i imagined that's how they ran their schedules.  She had the audacity to tell me that the solution would take a two man job and that I would have to cover all the expenses, I said excuse me the unit was working just fine before your tech came in and mess with it. She said that it couldn't have been caused by them. I told her i would be willing to cover expenses minus labor for their messing with the unit.  She said they couldn't do that, so i told her have a good day and hung up.  This company is no good...
reviews.owner_answer: We apologize that you were not satisfied with our company. We had originally scheduled a maintenance call but had to reschedule due to weather conditions which were out of our control. The day of the maintenance we advised that the unit was leaking. We cleared the line and performed the maintenance but we did advise that the coils would need to be cleaned if the leak persisted. We received a call after the service and we advised we would get someone back out. We returned the next day and the unit was no longer leaking water. We advised to monitor the system and call us with any issues. Two days later we returned to check the unit and advised that the coils needed to be cleaned. We were not given the approval at that time to go ahead with the coil clean so we could not touch the unit. About a month later we received a call asking why we had not performed the work. We advised that the coil clean was never authorized but we could schedule something that week. Due to the fact that we advised of the leak and coil clean on the original service we cannot cover any portion of the coil cleaning. We would be more than happy to go over this with you whenever it would be a convenient time for you. We apologize again that you were not satisfied.
